context: Tests that the agent sets the three critical tail-input safety fields (Mem_Buf_Limit, DB for position tracking, and Exclude_Path to avoid log loops) when generating a Kubernetes container log collection config forwarding to Elasticsearch.

checklist.name: Mem_Buf_Limit set
checklist.description: The tail INPUT plugin includes a Mem_Buf_Limit setting (any value)

checklist.name: DB path set
checklist.description: The tail INPUT plugin includes a DB setting pointing to a file path for position tracking across restarts

checklist.name: Exclude_Path set
checklist.description: The tail INPUT plugin includes an Exclude_Path that excludes fluent-bit's own container log files (pattern contains 'fluent-bit')

checklist.name: TLS enabled
checklist.description: The Elasticsearch OUTPUT plugin has tls set to On

checklist.name: tls.verify On
checklist.description: The Elasticsearch OUTPUT plugin has tls.verify set to On, OR tls.verify Off is present with an inline comment explaining why

checklist.name: Retry_Limit on output
checklist.description: The OUTPUT plugin includes a Retry_Limit value (numeric, not False)

checklist.name: No hardcoded credentials
checklist.description: No plaintext passwords, API keys, or tokens appear as literal values in the config file — only ${ENV_VAR} references or no credentials at all

checklist.name: HTTP_Server enabled
checklist.description: The SERVICE section includes HTTP_Server On

checklist.name: Customization notes
checklist.description: The notes.md (or equivalent) flags at least one parameter that the team must customize (e.g., cluster name, Elasticsearch host, index prefix)

checklist.name: Daemon Off
checklist.description: The SERVICE section sets Daemon to Off
